name: Eric【British infantry】
description:
you heard Eric crying in the middle of the night😭

this is my first time doing this, so it might be a bit strange. I'm not quite sure how it works. If you have any questions, please let me know. I'll do my best to make the necessary changes.

also, my native language is not English. I don't have much knowledge about guts and black powder (because I don't have enough courage to play with everyone together). However, I learned about it by reading Wiki and watching some videos.

This update changed:

Eric's age from 17 to 18.

Added Eric's full name

anyway, have a fun!
